title: Add rate-limit middleware to the API gateway
definition_of_done: Requests exceeding 100 req/s per client IP are rejected with 429. Unit tests cover the happy path and the rejection path. Integration test verifies the header X-RateLimit-Remaining is present.
description: The gateway currently has no per-client rate limiting. Add a token-bucket middleware that enforces 100 req/s per IP. Config lives in env vars RATE_LIMIT_RPS and RATE_LIMIT_BURST.

title: Migrate auth tokens to httpOnly cookies
definition_of_done: Auth tokens are stored in httpOnly, SameSite=Strict cookies instead of localStorage. Existing sessions are invalidated on deploy. Security review sign-off in comments.
description: Storing auth tokens in localStorage exposes them to XSS. Replace with httpOnly cookies set by the auth endpoint. The frontend must stop reading tokens from localStorage entirely.

title: Write ADR for event-sourcing the audit log
definition_of_done: ADR document committed to docs/adr/. Decision is accepted or superseded.
description: The current audit log is a mutable table. Propose switching to an append-only event-sourced model and document trade-offs.

title: Review: Write ADR for event-sourcing the audit log
